items.name: Sarah Cohen
items.content: Elad delivered an exceptional web application that exceeded our expectations. His attention to detail and technical expertise in React and Next.js made the development process smooth and efficient.

items.name: David Levi
items.content: Working with Elad on our educational platform was a great experience. He brought creative solutions to complex problems and delivered a high-quality product on time.

items.name: Maya Shapira
items.content: Elad combines strong technical skills with excellent communication. He understood our business needs and translated them into a beautiful, functional application.

items.name: Yoni Berger
items.content: The portfolio website Elad built for us is both visually stunning and incredibly fast. His use of modern technologies like Framer Motion and Next.js added a premium feel to the project.

recommendations.title: Recommendations

rec1.name: Kfir Guy
rec1.text: Elad is an exceptional developer who combines strong technical abilities with creative thinking. He's always eager to learn new technologies and brings a professional approach to every project.

rec2.name: Daniel Cohen
rec2.text: I've worked with Elad on multiple projects and was consistently impressed by his ability to deliver quality code quickly. He understands the big picture and knows how to translate business requirements into technical solutions.

rec3.name: Michal Levi
rec3.text: Elad is not just a great developer, but a true partner in the process. He understands UX, suggests smart solutions, and always thinks about the end user. Highly recommended.

experience.title: Experience & Expertise
experience.intro: Since 2024, I've built and deployed 26+ projects:
experience.haderech: HaDerech — An interactive learning platform with course systems, community forums, and practice simulators. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, and AI integrations.
experience.cms: AI Agent Network — A 3-agent system (Claude Code + Kami WhatsApp bot + Kaylee autonomous worker) running 24/7. Multi-agent coordination with 32 specialized sub-agents.
experience.edutech: Financial Manager — CLI + React Dashboard with Green Invoice API integration for business financial management.
experience.tools: oh-my-claudecode — Multi-agent orchestration framework with 32 specialized agents and 350+ custom skills.
experience.expertise: Technical skills: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, Supabase, Convex, MongoDB. AI/ML: Claude API, multi-agent orchestration, LLM integration, prompt engineering, MCP servers. DevOps: Git, GitHub Actions, Vercel, Hetzner VPS, Docker.
experience.beyond: With 12 years of entrepreneurship and combat military service, I bring maturity, systems thinking, and the ability to prioritize business outcomes — not just technical excellence.

maturity.title: AI-Native Developer
maturity.description: Building with AI and building AI systems — Claude API, multi-agent orchestration, MCP servers

lookingFor.title: What I'm Looking For
lookingFor.p1: I'm seeking my first full-time role — as a Full-Stack Developer, AI Engineer, or Software Engineer — with a team that believes AI-driven development is the future.
lookingFor.p2: I bring 26+ deployed projects, a working AI agent network, and 350+ custom Claude Code skills. Open to Remote, Hybrid, or On-site in Israel.
lookingFor.p3: If you're building something that changes how people work — EdTech, AI tools, developer tooling — I'd love to talk.

projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.subtitle: A collection of projects showcasing full-stack development, AI integration, and creative problem solving.

haderech.title: HaDerech - Learning Platform
haderech.description: An interactive learning platform that transforms how students master programming through hands-on practice and community support. Reduces learning time while increasing retention with AI-powered feedback and real-time progress tracking.

portfolio.title: Full-Stack Portfolio
portfolio.description: A high-converting developer portfolio that showcases technical excellence through smooth animations and bilingual content. Optimized for search engines and designed to turn visitors into clients with compelling storytelling.

eyAiKids.title: SipurAI - AI Children's Story Platform
eyAiKids.description: Safe AI-powered education that sparks creativity in children while giving parents full control. Features age-appropriate content filtering, parental oversight, and engaging story creation that makes learning fun.

omanut.title: Omanut HaKesher
omanut.description: A professional coaching business website that builds trust through compelling content and client testimonials. Full Hebrew RTL support and WhatsApp integration help reach the target audience effectively.

htmlToPptx.title: HTML to PPTX Converter
htmlToPptx.description: Converts HTML content into professional PowerPoint presentations instantly. Smart slide detection, 5 color themes, and full Hebrew RTL support. Upload files, paste HTML, or import from URL.

hebrewCalendar.title: Hebrew-Gregorian Calendar
hebrewCalendar.description: Eliminates date conversion headaches for users managing both Hebrew and Gregorian calendars. Instant holiday lookups and accurate calculations in an intuitive interface that anyone can use.

ninjaKeyboard.title: Ninja Keyboard
ninjaKeyboard.description: Helps Israeli kids master touch typing in Hebrew with game-based learning that keeps them engaged. Age-appropriate visual themes and progressive difficulty levels make typing practice fun, not frustrating.

bayitBeseder.title: Bayit BeSeder
bayitBeseder.description: Prevents costly home repairs by keeping families on top of maintenance schedules. Gamified task tracking motivates consistent upkeep, protecting property value and peace of mind.

kidushishi.title: Kidushishi Management
kidushishi.description: Simplifies complex event coordination with real-time location tracking and automated scheduling. Dashboard analytics help organizers make data-driven decisions and ensure flawless execution.

voiceChat.title: Voice Chat with Claude
voiceChat.description: Enables natural voice conversations with AI that feel as intuitive as talking to a colleague. Push-to-talk and continuous modes adapt to different use cases, from quick queries to extended brainstorming sessions.

zehutai.title: ZehutAI - Hebrew NLP
zehutai.description: Brings enterprise-grade natural language processing to Hebrew text analysis. RAG-powered insights help businesses understand customer sentiment and extract actionable intelligence from Hebrew content.

vacationVibe.title: VacationVibe - Vacation Manager
vacationVibe.description: A full-stack vacation booking platform with role-based access control, real-time notifications, and analytics dashboard. Streamlines PTO management for organizations with automated approval workflows and visual reporting.

teamMeetings.title: Team Meetings Manager
teamMeetings.description: Modern team meeting management system with interactive multi-view calendar, room booking, participant tracking, and Excel export. Drag-and-drop scheduling with full Hebrew RTL support makes coordination effortless.

customerCrm.title: Customer CRM
customerCrm.description: Full-stack customer and task management system built with Angular and Node.js. CRUD operations, per-customer task tracking, JWT authentication, and a clean Hebrew interface for managing client relationships.
